_meta.audit: DRAFT — founder copy pass required (roadmap: agents scaffold screens, copy is founder-owned; operator-expected §3). This file is the summary screen's ONE audited copy table (ADR-9), deliberately SEPARATE from quizConfig.json (Architect Q1, Session 18: nothing in this file can become an engine-rendered quiz step). Panel-signed Session 18: PM authored, Brand SIGNED with zero required replacements (two optional founder alternatives recorded in the session ledger: savingsCaption alt 'saved in a year at this rate.'; window-absent stays omit-entirely). Lexicon-scanned by SlipLexiconTests on every CI run, shipping AND degraded. Register rules honored: the risk-window phrases are reflection hedges over the user's own trigger answers ('likely', never a clinical prediction — 'predicted' stays quarantined to the internal field name); the savings caption is an Honest hedge (the figure is floored, never overstated); no shame token, no medical claim, no urgency, no exclamation mark, no fabricated statistic.

savingsCaption: saved in a year, if you stay on track.
savingsAbsent: Every clean day is time and focus back — we'll count the streak that matters to you.
windowEvenings: Your first hard window is likely evenings.
windowAfterWork: Your first hard window is likely just after work.
windowSocial: Your first hard window is likely around social plans.
windowAlone: Your first hard window is likely in quiet moments alone.
windowBoredom: Your first hard window is likely when things get idle.
windowStress: Your first hard window is likely when stress spikes.
